sentence: FONO will follow your sonificant other into every quiet room you share.

wombos.definition: A significant other who carries son energy — a romantic partner you regard with that grounded, familiar affection.
wombos.example: She's not just my girlfriend, she's my sonificant other.

wombos.definition: Fear of nonchalashout — the anxiety that someone around you is on the verge of a calm but unpredictable meltdown.
wombos.example: I had serious FONO watching him sit there silently at dinner.
